title: CobbleMania Ranked
description: Competitive matchmaking for Cobblemon with Ranked ladders, featuring 1v1 (Singles/Doubles) and 2v2 team battle modes.
body:
⚔️ CobbleMania Ranked

CobbleMania Ranked is a competitive matchmaking and ladder system designed specifically for the Cobblemon ecosystem. This mod transforms the way players interact by providing a structured environment for competitive battling, ranking, and skill progression.

🎮 Available Battle Formats
Whether you prefer solo strategies or team-based play, the mod supports the most popular competitive formats:

1v1 Singles: The standard individual battle format to test your core team's strength.

1v1 Doubles: A tactical format featuring two Pokémon on the field simultaneously.

2v2 Team Battles: Team up with a friend to take on another duo in a coordinated battle for glory.

⚙️ Main Features
Automated Matchmaking: A seamless queue system that finds opponents for you based on the selected format.

Ranked Ladder System: Climb the ranks from Bronze to Master. Every victory counts towards your global standing.

Elo-Based Progression: A fair scoring system that adjusts based on the skill level of your opponents.

Detailed Statistics: Track your performance with integrated win/loss records and ranking history.

Lightweight & Optimized: Built to run smoothly alongside other mods without impacting your game's performance.

🚀 Getting Started
To use this mod, simply ensure you have the latest version of Cobblemon installed. Once in-game, you can access the Ranked interface to start your journey to the top of the leaderboard!
